patches.find: V ≈ 20 mV to 350 mV — comfortably detectable on any oscilloscope or high-impedance voltmeter
patches.replace: V ≈ 20 mV to 350 mV (spanning coplanar and coaxial mutual inductance coupling — coaxial coil alignment yields the upper end of the range) — comfortably detectable on any oscilloscope or high-impedance voltmeter
patches.rationale: ISS-1092: Add optional parenthetical noting the range combines coplanar and coaxial orientations, with coaxial yielding the higher end. Current text is correct but compressed.

patches.replace: a 415× discrepancy; even at 3,000 km (area ≈ 2.83 × 10<sup>7</sup> km², ratio ~44:1) the required B<sub>south</sub> ≈ 1,400 nT still falls 46× short of the fitted 64,852 nT — catastrophically self-contradictory regardless of aperture assumption)
patches.rationale: ISS-1126: Add 3,000 km sensitivity point to bound B_south even at far-larger-than-described aperture, per curmudgeon c3 request.

patches.find: This is not a data disagreement; it is the dome's toroidal topology contradicting its own B(r) equation.
patches.replace: This is not a data disagreement; it is the dome's toroidal topology contradicting its own B(r) equation. The topology also imposes a directional constraint: with the north pole as flux source and the Antarctic return as flux sink, the field at the southern terminus should be directed oppositely to the northern one; B(r)'s positive coefficient C = 64,852 nT assigns the same outward sign at both ends, adding a directional contradiction on top of the magnitude failure.
patches.rationale: ISS-1127: Add sentence noting the north-source/south-sink topology requires opposite-directed fields at the two poles, which B(r)'s positive C coefficient violates.

patches.find: This is the same acknowledge-without-fix pattern visible in the dome's OpenTimestamps narrative adoption
patches.replace: This is the same acknowledge-without-fix pattern (acknowledging a critique in commentary while leaving the underlying architecture unchanged) visible in the dome's OpenTimestamps narrative adoption
patches.rationale: ISS-1161: Define 'acknowledge-without-fix pattern' on first use in SEC-4.1 (part4) — the term appears without explanation at its first occurrence.
